chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Revision Application No.169 of 2025 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For hg of case 2.For hg of MA No.10777/25 21.01.2026. Mr. Sarvech Abbasi, advocate for applicant. Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Additional Prosecutor General. After arguing this matter at some length, learned counsel for applicant does not press this application and seeks direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial so that the order in respect of the vehicle could be passed by the trial Court. In view of above, this Cr. Revision Application is dismissed as not pressed. The trial Court is, however, directed to decide the matter in two months and pass order in accordance with law in respect of restoration of vehicle to the applicant and submit report. The Cr. Revision Application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
